RTN App Palette System

Color-coded gradient bars by app category · R diverging palettes (colorblind-friendly)

Palette Key

Viridis — Literacy
Spectral — Social
Plasma — Assessment
Cividis — Other
Viridis
Literacy
📊
Literacy Tracking
Digital Literacy Tracker
Progress monitoring for structured literacy intervention. Tracks skills across sound, word, and text levels.
literacy-tracker.html
📖
Simulation
Dyslexia Simulation
Interactive simulation to build empathy for struggling readers. Three types of text distortion with reflection.
dyslexia-simulation-main
📖
Session Planning
Session Builder
Structured literacy session planner with built-in data collection. Plan across sound, word, and text levels.
session-builder-main
🔤
Practice
Sight Word Flashcards
First 100 sight words with Montessori grammar color coding. Based on Green et al., 2024.
sight-word-flashcards-main
Spectral
Social
🧩
PDA Intervention
The Autonomy-First Toolkit
PDA-profile intervention planner. Declarative language, CPS Plan B, Unstuck & On Target, interoception.
pda-toolkit-main ✓ done
📋
Social-Communication
SCDFI
Social-Communication & Developmental Functioning Inventory. Multi-informant assessment tool.
SCDFI-main 3
Plasma
Assessment / Intake / Eval
📋
Student Intake
RTN Student Self-Report Intake
Neurodiversity-affirming, strengths-based student self-report intake form for SLPs and reading specialists.
rtn-digital-intake-main
📝
Intake Forms
Evaluation Intake Forms
Trauma-informed parent/caregiver and teacher/educator intake forms for SLP evaluation.
evaluation-intake
🧪
Evaluation
SLP Evaluation Wizard
Full SLP evaluation report builder. Structured sections for assessment, analysis, and recommendations.
RTN_SLP_Eval_Wizard_v4_1.html
📈
Benchmark
CUBED-3 Benchmark Score Report
Dynamic Decoding Measures benchmark scoring and progress visualization.
CUBED3-DDM-Benchmark.html
🔠
Assessment
CORE Phonics Survey
Score report for the CORE Phonics Survey — alphabetic knowledge, reading, and spelling subtests.
Core-Phonics-Survey.html
🎯
Assessment
PAST Score Report
Phonological Awareness Screening Test — scoring, analysis, and phonological awareness profiling.
PAST-Score-Report.html
Cividis
Other
🧠
Education
Brain Pathways
Interactive brain diagram showing overlapping neural networks of reading, learning, and trauma.
brain-pathways-main
🌱
Trauma-Informed
Trauma-Informed Activity Planner
Adapt activities through a trauma-informed lens using SAMHSA principles, DIR/Floortime, and sensory processing.
trauma-informed-planner
🌍
Systems Mapping
Ecological Systems & Trauma Explorer
Map trauma across Bronfenbrenner's ecological systems and identify effects on learning.
eco-explorer-upload

Full Palette Swatches

Viridis
Spectral
Plasma
Cividis
RTN | Speech, Language & Literacy · Rachel Terra Norton, MS, CCC-SLP · All palettes are R diverging (colorblind-friendly)
